subject: use new image with updated certs
commit_message:
use new image with updated certs

Signed-off-by: Dominic Lunanuova <dgl@research.att.com>
Change-Id: If0dda5f4cf86bb0a7ba9f2e805e67693257cc674
Issue-ID: DMAAP-1424
